rationale: Trump's claim of a Sunday Iran deal signing is the dominant story for US residents — potential end to the Iran war and oil market implications — but Tehran's denial keeps it unresolved.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump claims Sunday signing, Tehran disputes
top_events.summary: A signed deal could end US military involvement in Iran and ease oil prices, but conflicting signals from Tehran mean no confirmed outcome yet for American households.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike
top_events.summary: US airstrike eliminates the top leader of a violent gang that has operated inside US borders, a continuation of the established strike campaign with modest domestic security relevance.

top_events.title: Anthropic AI tools suspended over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Federal AI security policy continues to restrict Anthropic tools; ongoing background policy story with limited immediate impact on most Americans.
